text.title: Agent Drafts Spec Before Coding Procedure
text.summary: Six-step procedure to apply the spec-first gate on a single ticket.

step.name: detect-assignment
step.action: Agent receives assignment event; pause any code-edit tools.
step.decision-gate: If ticket has `agent:auto-approve` label applied by human, SKIP to step 5.

step.name: discover-context
step.input: Ticket body + linked artefacts + code-intel search
step.action: Pull every linked Notion / Slack / prior-ticket reference; run code-intel search for touched modules.

step.name: draft-spec-comment
step.action: Compose three-section spec comment: `## Current state`, `## Desired state`, `## Proposed plan`. Post on the ticket.

step.name: wait-for-approval
step.action: Poll for thumbs-up / `/agent approve` / `agent:approved` label. Timeout after 7 days → ping reviewer, do NOT auto-approve.
step.decision-gate: If no approval after 7 days, STOP and escalate to assignee.

step.name: implement-and-open-pr
step.action: Implement changes; open PR; description MUST include `Spec: <comment-url>` and `Approval: <event-url>`.

step.name: validate-and-merge
step.action: Run `scripts/validate-task-agent-drafts-spec-before-coding.py --file artefact.json` to confirm spec shape + approval linkage. Required check gates merge.
